name: room in the castle
description: I'm in a room in the castle
hints: There are animal heads on the wall. There may be a hidden safe.
LOOK or MOVE HEADS to find the hidden safe. The safe may contain useful items.
Find and open the safe behind the animal heads. SOUTH to kettle room, EAST to the pot/lab area.
notes: Room with mounted animal heads hiding a safe. SOUTH returns to the kettle room (room 3). EAST goes to the cast iron pot room (room 7).
